query: ok so I've got the workflow file populated for SPEC-013 at docs/ai/specs/SPEC-013-workflow.md and all the prompts look good. can you kick off the autonomous execution? I want all 7 phases with auto-commits
run autopilot on the SPEC-027 workflow. the file is at docs/ai/specs/027-calendar-sync/SPEC-027-workflow.md. I already filled in all the phase prompts and the constitution is set up

I need you to execute the full speckit workflow autonomously. here's the workflow file: /path/to/project/docs/ai/specs/SPEC-004-workflow.md — go through specify, clarify, plan, checklist, tasks, analyze, and implement with gate validation between each phase

the workflow is ready at specs/SPEC-019-workflow.md for the notification system feature. please start autonomous execution and commit after each phase passes its gate. I've already reviewed all the prompts
can you do the full end-to-end speckit run for me? I've got SPEC-008 workflow populated and I want it to go through all phases automatically. if a gate fails, do the consensus protocol and keep going

hey I just finished populating the workflow template for our auth refactor spec. it's at docs/ai/specs/SPEC-031-auth-refactor/SPEC-031-workflow.md. ready for you to take over and drive it through all the SDD phases

start the autonomous speckit pipeline on my spec. workflow is docs/ai/specs/SPEC-015-workflow.md. run each phase as a subagent, validate gates, resolve any disagreements with consensus, and auto-commit passing artifacts

I've been doing the SDD phases manually and it's taking forever. can you just run the whole thing autonomously? the workflow file for SPEC-022 is populated and sitting at specs/022-search/SPEC-022-workflow.md

execute workflow for the database migration spec. file: docs/ai/specs/SPEC-041-db-migration/SPEC-041-workflow.md. I want full autonomous mode — all 7 phases, gate checks, consensus if needed, commits after each pass

alright everything is set up for the payment integration spec. workflow template is populated at SPEC-009-workflow.md. kick off autopilot and let it run through specify to implement. I'll review the PR when it's done
I'm confused about how the consensus protocol works. when does it trigger during a phase and how many agents need to agree? can you explain the voting mechanism?
the simplicity gate keeps failing on my spec. it says I have too many acceptance criteria. how do I fix this without losing important requirements?
help me set up speckit for a new project. I need to run specify init and configure the constitution for our team's coding standards
what's the status of SPEC-014? I want to see which phases have passed their gates and which are still pending
can you review the PR for SPEC-008 and resolve the review threads? the PR number is #42 on the racecraft/omnifocus-mcp repo
how should I decompose this large feature into multiple specs? I've got a user management system that needs auth, profiles, roles, and audit logging
which checklist domains should I select for a REST API spec? I'm building an endpoint for task creation with validation and error handling
write a unit test for the createTask primitive. it should mock executeOmniJS and verify the script template is correct
I need to create a technical roadmap for the omnifocus-mcp project. we have 5 specs that need to be sequenced based on their dependencies
can you walk me through how to write good testable requirements for the spec phase? I want to make sure my acceptance criteria are specific enough
interview me about the spec for SPEC-009. ask one question at a time with your recommended answer so I can agree or push back
grill me on the design for the new search feature before I commit to anything. walk every branch of the design tree
